decision.rationale: The plate violates all three cited identity rules: 1) For IR.sean.proportion.head-to-body-1-to-7, the head-to-body proportion is roughly 1:4 to 1:4.5 (stylized/chibi-like) instead of the required 1:7 heroic-realistic proportion. 2) For IR.sean.proportion.hip-to-floor-4-head-heights, the hip line sits approximately 1.5 to 2 head-heights above the floor, which violates the requirement of sitting approximately 4 head-heights above the floor at neutral stance. 3) For IR.sean.motion.walk-cycle-neutral-gait-source-plate, the plate does not show a single neutral upright gait pose; instead, it is a sequence of 9 walk-cycle frames with proportions that do not match the Sean register.
